<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Image\Colors\Hsv\Channels; use Intervention\Image\Colors\AbstractColorChannel; class Value extends AbstractColorChannel { /** * {@inheritdoc} * * @see ColorChannelInterface::min() */ public function min(): int { return 0; } /** * {@inheritdoc} * * @see ColorChannelInterface::max() */ public function max(): int { return 100; } }
